name: facebook-auto-system
description: He thong xu ly Facebook comment tu dong voi Kafka, AI, Retry va Dead Letter Queue

scripts.dev:webhook: cd services/webhook-service  && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:core: cd services/core-service      && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend: cd services/backend-api       && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:retry: cd services/retry-service     && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd services/webhook-service && npm i && cd ../core-service && npm i && cd ../backend-api && npm i && cd ../retry-service && npm i
